'''âs-w-d''' ('''sawada''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:foosther|foosther]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-w-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:foosther|foosther]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âs-w-d
|-
! Lemma
| sawada
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sawadithi|sawadithi]] || [[word:sawadiji|sawadiji]] || [[word:sawadishi|sawadishi]] || [[word:sawadi|sawadi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:sawaduthuth|sawaduthuth]] || [[word:sawadujuj|sawadujuj]] || [[word:sawadushush|sawadushush]] || [[word:sawad|sawad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:sawaduthu|sawaduthu]] || [[word:sawaduju|sawaduju]] || [[word:sawadushu|sawadushu]] || [[word:sawadu|sawadu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:sawadufuth|sawadufuth]] || [[word:sawadufuj|sawadufuj]] || [[word:sawadufush|sawadufush]] || [[word:sawaduf|sawaduf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sawadethe|sawadethe]] || [[word:sawadeje|sawadeje]] || [[word:sawadeshe|sawadeshe]] || [[word:sawade|sawade]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sawadothoth|sawadothoth]] || [[word:sawadojoj|sawadojoj]] || [[word:sawadoshosh|sawadoshosh]] || [[word:sawad|sawad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sawadotho|sawadotho]] || [[word:sawadojo|sawadojo]] || [[word:sawadosho|sawadosho]] || [[word:sawado|sawado]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sawadofoth|sawadofoth]] || [[word:sawadofoj|sawadofoj]] || [[word:sawadofosh|sawadofosh]] || [[word:sawadof|sawadof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sawadĂŠthĂŠ|sawadĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:sawadĂŠjĂŠ|sawadĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:sawadĂŠshĂŠ|sawadĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:sawadĂŠ|sawadĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:sawadathath|sawadathath]] || [[word:sawadajaj|sawadajaj]] || [[word:sawadashash|sawadashash]] || [[word:sawad|sawad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:sawadatha|sawadatha]] || [[word:sawadaja|sawadaja]] || [[word:sawadasha|sawadasha]] || [[word:sawada|sawada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sawadafath|sawadafath]] || [[word:sawadafaj|sawadafaj]] || [[word:sawadafash|sawadafash]] || [[word:sawadaf|sawadaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:sawadasha|sawadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gosawadasha|gosawadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokisawadasha|gokisawadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:sawadnĂŒsha|sawadnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gosawadnknĂŒsha|gosawadnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokisawadnĂŒsha|gokisawadnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sawadshĂ«sha|sawadshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosawadnkshĂ«sha|gosawadnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisawadshĂ«sha|gokisawadshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sawadrosha|sawadrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosawadnkrosha|gosawadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisawadrosha|gokisawadrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sawadmusha|sawadmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gosawadnkmusha|gosawadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisawadmusha|gokisawadmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:sawadsherasha|sawadsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gosawadnksherasha|gosawadnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokisawadsherasha|gokisawadsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:sawadngasha|sawadngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gosawadnkngasha|gosawadnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokisawadngasha|gokisawadngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:sawadyasha|sawadyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gosawadnkyasha|gosawadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokisawadyasha|gokisawadyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:sawadyamasha|sawadyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gosawadnkyamasha|gosawadnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokisawadyamasha|gokisawadyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:sawadnĂŒshĂ«sha|sawadnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosawadnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gosawadnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisawadnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokisawadnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sawadnĂŒrosha|sawadnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosawadnknĂŒrosha|gosawadnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisawadnĂŒrosha|gokisawadnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sawadnĂŒmusha|sawadnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosawadnknĂŒmusha|gosawadnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisawadnĂŒmusha|gokisawadnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:sawadshĂ«nĂŒsha|sawadshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosawadnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gosawadnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisawadshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokisawadshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sawadshĂ«rosha|sawadshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosawadnkshĂ«rosha|gosawadnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisawadshĂ«rosha|gokisawadshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sawadshĂ«musha|sawadshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosawadnkshĂ«musha|gosawadnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisawadshĂ«musha|gokisawadshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:sawadronĂŒsha|sawadronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosawadnkronĂŒsha|gosawadnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisawadronĂŒsha|gokisawadronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:sawadroshĂ«sha|sawadroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosawadnkroshĂ«sha|gosawadnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisawadroshĂ«sha|gokisawadroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sawadromusha|sawadromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosawadnkromusha|gosawadnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisawadromusha|gokisawadromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:sawadmunĂŒsha|sawadmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosawadnkmunĂŒsha|gosawadnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisawadmunĂŒsha|gokisawadmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:sawadmushĂ«sha|sawadmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosawadnkmushĂ«sha|gosawadnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisawadmushĂ«sha|gokisawadmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sawadmurosha|sawadmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosawadnkmurosha|gosawadnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisawadmurosha|gokisawadmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:sawad|sawad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:sĂŠwĂŠd|sĂŠwĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hosawad|hosawad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hosĂŠwĂŠd|hosĂŠwĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohosawad|hohosawad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohosĂŠwĂŠd|hohosĂŠwĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒsawad|nĂŒsawad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒsĂŠwĂŠd|nĂŒsĂŠwĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒsawad|nĂŒnĂŒsawad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒsĂŠwĂŠd|nĂŒnĂŒsĂŠwĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻsawad|nĂŻsawad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻsĂŠwĂŠd|nĂŻsĂŠwĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻsawad|nĂŻnĂŻsawad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻsĂŠwĂŠd|nĂŻnĂŻsĂŠwĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lusawad|lusawad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lusĂŠwĂŠd|lusĂŠwĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulusawad|lulusawad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulusĂŠwĂŠd|lulusĂŠwĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lisawad|lisawad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lisĂŠwĂŠd|lisĂŠwĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilisawad|lilisawad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilisĂŠwĂŠd|lilisĂŠwĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kosawad|kosawad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kosĂŠwĂŠd|kosĂŠwĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokosawad|kokosawad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokosĂŠwĂŠd|kokosĂŠwĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kesawad|kesawad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kesĂŠwĂŠd|kesĂŠwĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekesawad|kekesawad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekesĂŠwĂŠd|kekesĂŠwĂŠd]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
